allow: Bash(printf "# ADVERTIS SaaS - Environment Variables\\n# Copy this file to .env and fill in the values\\n\\nAUTH_SECRET=\\nDATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:YOUR_PASSWORD@localhost:5432/advertis_dev\\nANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...\\n")
Bash(wmic process where "name like ''%git%''" get processid,name,commandline)
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.ProcessName -match ""git""} | Select-Object Id, ProcessName | Format-Table -AutoSize')
